message:
fix: review improvements to purge_issue and config prefix inference

purge_issue: split OR-based dependency delete into two separate
statements to match the pattern used by remove_all_dependencies,
avoiding potential fsqlite OR-clause edge cases.

config: replace full-file common_prefix_from_jsonl with fast
first_prefix_from_jsonl that reads only the first JSONL line.
The full-file scan ran on every command via load_config, which
was O(n) for n issues. Now O(1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
